files.title: File:Pictorial Key to the Tarot.jpg
File:Rider-Waite Major Arcana full.png
files.artist: Pamela Coleman Smith and Arthur Edward Waite

files.title: File:RWS-06-thelovers.jpg
files.credit: The original artwork for this image is now Public Domain. This is not the same card as that which license is held by US Games Company. This has been recolored by me

files.title: File:RWS02 High-Priestess crown.svg
files.artist: Original author was Pamela Colman Smith in 1909; subsequent image manipulation and clean-up by User:AnonMoos
files.credit: Took Image:Rwt_major_02.png (raw scan of "The High Priestess" Tarot card which is in public domain in the United States in this uncolorized form), did a vector trace of the part of the image containing the crown, and subsequently cleaned up the vector trace (including averaging the left and right halves to impose bilateral symmetry), and also added simple fill gradients to roughly simulate the overall appearance of the colored card (see File:RWS_Tarot_02_High_Priestess.jpg etc.).

files.title: File:RWS07 The-Chariot yoni-lingam Symbol.svg
files.artist: Original author was Pamela Colman Smith in 1909 (modified from an abstract stylized pseudo-Egyptian lotus motif in an earlier version of the Tarot card by Eliphas Levi); subsequent image manipulation and clean-up by User:AnonMoos
files.credit: Took Image:Rwt_major_07.png (raw scan of "The Chariot" Tarot card which is in public domain in the United States in this uncolorized form), did a vector trace of the part of the image containing the symbol, and subsequently heavily cleaned up and symmetrized the vector trace, also adding a simple uniform red background color to the central symbol.

files.title: File:Tarot Moon Brown Dye.jpg
files.credit: Re-colorization of w:Image:Major 18.jpg . w:User:Sgeureka , based on w:User:Don Leon 's file, User:Machina in the Deep-Blue Sea uploaded in Commons as Image:RWS-18-SUN.jpg .
